response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience, particularly in backend and full-stack roles, but lacks direct experience with hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator optimization. While they demonstrate strong software engineering skills and some low-level programming (C/C++, DLang), their background does not align closely with the required hardware-software co-design, performance analysis for AI workloads, or SoC development. Their work in cloud infrastructure is also limited and not focused on AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong software engineering and full-stack development expertise across multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex systems, including open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator architecture
Lack of demonstrated work with deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD paradigms

Education (BS in CS) and experience do not meet the required qualifications for the Principal-level role (e.g., no PhD/master’s in relevant field + insufficient years of technical experience for Bachelor’s path)
